issue_body:
### The problem

I am using the new Weatherflow integration, and after some time (as short has 15 minutes), the data in the Weatherflow sensors stop receiving updates.  The weather station is transmitting data during this time, because the online cloud has data during these periods and if I restart HA the data starts flowing again (temporarily). There is nothing containing "weatherflow" in my HA log output.

In the following screenshot, here is temperature data that has not updated for 18 hours.  I restarted HA prior to 3pm on the graph, where data briefly flows until it stays at the last reading.
![Screenshot from 2023-10-18 09-07-11](https://github.com/home-assistant/core/assets/349445/a02add53-f764-4cdc-b708-aefcfecbe4f3)

### What version of Home Assistant Core has the issue?

core-2023.10.3

### What was the last working version of Home Assistant Core?

_No response_

### What type of installation are you running?

Home Assistant OS

### Integration causing the issue

weatherflow

### Link to integration documentation on our website

https://www.home-assistant.io/integrations/weatherflow

### Diagnostics information

_No response_

### Example YAML snippet

_No response_

### Anything in the logs that might be useful for us?

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_
pr_title: Handle null data in WeatherFlow sensors
pr_body:

<!--
